## Runtime.IChocolateLibraryParams.libraries property

Pre-instantiated library instances. Used for advanced scenarios like testing or custom library construction. If provided along with other sources, collections are combined.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly libraries?: IInstantiatedLibrarySource;
```
